overall.description: Cinematic first-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked industrial district. The player moves alongside freight train tracks past neon-lit billboards, palm trees, and refinery towers shrouded in thick orange fog, eventually crossing a street intersection with passing traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial freight corridor alongside train tracks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily alongside stationary freight train cars on the right, passing industrial warehouses with illuminated billboards on the left

entered.detail: dark cylindrical tanker cars and boxcars stationary on parallel tracks
large corrugated metal industrial building with fenced perimeter
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying '3rd Amendment' text with red graphics
tall palm tree silhouetted against orange fog
tall pole with bright orange sodium vapor lamp illuminating the fog
metal framework spanning the tracks with directional signage

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking alongside stationary freight train cars through a narrow industrial corridor. Orange neon street lights pierce through heavy fog and rain, illuminating digital billboards on the left while palm trees stand silhouetted in the distance. The atmosphere is dense and dystopian, characteristic of a cyberpunk industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial approach to urban intersection with overhead traffic signage

events.description: passes under overhead metal gantry with directional traffic arrows
industrial buildings give way to reveal distant corporate skyscrapers visible through thick fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the track path, passing under metal gantries and approaching a traffic intersection with tall buildings emerging from the fog

entered.detail: overhead metal structure with illuminated directional arrows pointing forward
tall corporate towers with red warning lights visible through the orange haze

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking forward, passing underneath overhead sign gantries as the industrial corridor opens slightly. The freight train remains on the right while the view ahead reveals towering skyscrapers piercing through the foggy atmosphere. The environment transitions from enclosed industrial buildings to a more open approach toward an urban intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street intersection with traffic control and crosswalk

events.description: traffic lights change from red to green, signaling vehicles to proceed
dark colored sedan drives through the intersection from left to right

agents.ego_description: crossing the street intersection while maintaining forward movement alongside the train tracks, navigating through the crosswalk

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right under green traffic lights

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signal showing green light and street name signs
painted white zebra stripes on wet asphalt marking pedestrian crossing
concrete and metal barrier separating the walkway from the street

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the street intersection, crossing the road as traffic lights turn green. A dark sedan passes through the intersection from left to right. The freight train continues alongside on the right, while traffic infrastructure and road barriers define the new urban space. The foggy atmosphere persists with orange street lights reflecting off the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked industrial corridor that gradually opens into a bustling urban intersection. It begins by walking alongside stationary freight train cars, where orange neon lights and digital billboards pierce through a dense, dystopian fog. As the camera moves forward, the narrow corridor expands beneath overhead sign gantries, revealing towering skyscrapers that loom through the haze in the distance. The scene then shifts from the enclosed industrial zone to an open street crossing, where the camera navigates through road barriers as a dark sedan passes by. Finally, the movement concludes at the intersection, with the orange glow of street lights reflecting off the wet pavement while the freight train continues its path alongside the urban traffic.
